properties.name: Asia → Europe (Main Line)
properties.whyItMatters: Carries ~25% of global container trade; the world's busiest liner corridor.

properties.name: Transpacific (Asia → US West Coast)
properties.whyItMatters: Largest bilateral trade lane by container volume; US import lifeline.

properties.name: Asia → Mediterranean
properties.whyItMatters: COSCO hub at Piraeus feeds SE Europe; BRI western anchor.

properties.name: Transatlantic (Europe → US East Coast)
properties.whyItMatters: High-value manufactured goods corridor between NATO allies.

properties.name: Intra-Asia (China → SE Asia)
properties.whyItMatters: Fastest-growing container lane; ASEAN manufacturing integration.

properties.name: Asia → US East Coast (via Suez)
properties.whyItMatters: Growing alternative to Transpacific + rail; avoids West Coast congestion.

properties.name: South America → Europe
properties.whyItMatters: Brazil-EU agricultural and manufactured goods exchange.

properties.name: Persian Gulf → East Asia (Crude Oil)
properties.whyItMatters: ~17 mb/d of crude transits Hormuz; China/Japan/Korea dependent.

properties.name: Persian Gulf → Europe (Crude Oil)
properties.whyItMatters: EU refinery supply line; disruption at Suez or Hormuz spikes Brent prices.

properties.name: US Gulf → East Asia (LNG)
properties.whyItMatters: US is world's largest LNG exporter; Panama Canal transit critical.

properties.name: Russia → Europe (Crude & Products)
properties.whyItMatters: Bosporus bottleneck for Urals crude; sanctions reroute via Cape.

properties.name: West Africa → East Asia (Crude Oil)
properties.whyItMatters: Nigerian/Angolan crude to Chinese refineries; avoids Suez entirely.

properties.name: Persian Gulf → India (Crude Oil)
properties.whyItMatters: India imports ~85% of crude; Hormuz is a single point of failure.

properties.name: Australia → China (Iron Ore)
properties.whyItMatters: Single largest dry-bulk trade by tonnage; ~900 Mt/yr of iron ore.

properties.name: Brazil → China (Iron Ore)
properties.whyItMatters: Vale's 40-day voyage; Cape route makes it price-sensitive to freight rates.

properties.name: US Gulf → East Asia (Grain)
properties.whyItMatters: US corn and soybean exports; Panama Canal draft limits Panamax loads.

properties.name: Black Sea → Mediterranean (Grain)
properties.whyItMatters: Ukraine/Russia wheat to MENA; Bosporus congestion and war risk.

properties.name: South Africa → Europe (Coal)
properties.whyItMatters: Thermal coal for EU power; declining but spikes during energy crises.

properties.name: Australia → India (Coal)
properties.whyItMatters: Coking coal for Indian steel; Lombok Strait alternative when Malacca congested.

properties.name: Cape Route (Asia → Europe bypass)
properties.whyItMatters: Fallback when Suez/Red Sea is disrupted; adds ~10 days and significant fuel cost.

properties.name: Taiwan Strait Corridor
properties.whyItMatters: ~50% of global container fleet transits annually; geopolitical flashpoint.

properties.name: Bosporus Grain Corridor
properties.whyItMatters: Critical chokepoint for Black Sea grain; Turkish Straits Convention limits transit.

properties.name: Strait of Hormuz Energy Corridor
properties.whyItMatters: ~21% of global oil consumption transits daily; most watched chokepoint on earth.

properties.name: Bab el-Mandeb Corridor
properties.whyItMatters: Houthi attacks force reroutes around the Cape; connects Gulf to Med.
